objectives: Understand fundamental Python syntax and data types.
Write basic Python scripts for simple tasks.
Learn about variables, operators, and control flow in Python.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Python Programming

objectives: Grasp core JavaScript concepts like variables, data types, and operators.
Implement basic DOM manipulation.
Understand event handling in JavaScript.
learning_path.title: JavaScript Fundamentals for Web Development

objectives: Understand the core concepts of object-oriented programming.
Learn to model real-world problems using objects and classes.
Explore concepts like encapsulation, inheritance, and polymorphism.
learning_path.title: Object-Oriented Modeling Principles

objectives: Learn the basic syntax and structure of Java.
Write and compile simple Java programs.
Understand Java's object-oriented features.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Java Programming

objectives: Explore the syntax and features of the Ruby programming language.
Write simple Ruby scripts.
Understand Ruby's approach to object-oriented programming.
learning_path.title: Getting Started with Ruby Programming

objectives: Understand the benefits of using TypeScript over JavaScript.
Learn TypeScript's type system.
Write and compile basic TypeScript code.
learning_path.title: Introduction to TypeScript

objectives: Understand the challenges and best practices for data migration.
Learn different approaches to migrating existing data.
Plan and execute a basic data migration task.
learning_path.title: Data Migration Strategies and Techniques

objectives: Understand the fundamental concepts of computer programming.
Learn about algorithms and data structures.
Develop problem-solving skills through coding exercises.
learning_path.title: Programming Fundamentals

objectives: Learn the basics of the R programming language.
Perform fundamental data manipulation and analysis in R.
Create basic visualizations using R.
learning_path.title: Introduction to R for Data Analysis

objectives: Understand the features and advantages of Groovy.
Write simple Groovy scripts.
Learn how Groovy integrates with the Java Virtual Machine.
learning_path.title: Exploring Groovy for JVM Development

objectives: Understand the declarative nature of Prolog.
Write simple Prolog programs for problem-solving.
Learn about facts, rules, and queries in Prolog.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Prolog for Logic Programming

objectives: Learn the basics of Perl syntax and constructs.
Write Perl scripts for file manipulation and text processing.
Understand regular expressions in Perl.
learning_path.title: Perl Scripting for Text Processing

objectives: Explore the pure object-oriented paradigm of Smalltalk.
Write basic Smalltalk programs.
Understand the Smalltalk environment and message passing.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Smalltalk Programming

objectives: Understand the low-level nature of Assembly language.
Learn basic Assembly instructions and addressing modes.
Write simple Assembly programs.
learning_path.title: Fundamentals of Assembly Language Programming

objectives: Understand the principles of concurrent programming in Erlang.
Write basic Erlang programs for message passing.
Learn about processes and supervisors in Erlang.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Erlang for Concurrent Systems

matched_occupation.description: Mobile application developers implement applications software for mobile devices, based on the designs provided, using general or specific development tools for device operating systems.
matched_occupation.label: mobile application developer
